Class FileHandler

java.lang.Object
jogo.io.FileHandler
public class FileHandler extends Object
Handles all file input and output operations for saving and loading game sessions. Serializes and deserializes the game state into a structured CSV format.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    FileHandler.SaveData
    Container class used to securely encapsulate and return the parsed game data upon a successful load operation.

    static FileHandler.SaveData
    loadGame()
    Reads and parses the save file to reconstruct the complete prior game state.
    static void
    saveFullGame(WorldMap map, Player p1, Player p2, int day)
    Serializes the current game state, including active players, world map structures, and the current day progression, into a CSV file.

  • Constructor Details

    • FileHandler

      public FileHandler()

  • Method Details

    • saveFullGame

      public static void saveFullGame(WorldMap map, Player p1, Player p2, int day) throws IOException
      Serializes the current game state, including active players, world map structures, and the current day progression, into a CSV file.
      Parameters:
      map - The WorldMap containing all active structures.
      p1 - The first Player instance.
      p2 - The second Player instance.
      day - The current day counter of the game session.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing to the save file.

    • loadGame

      public static FileHandler.SaveData loadGame() throws GameException
      Reads and parses the save file to reconstruct the complete prior game state.
      Returns:
      A SaveData container wrapping the restored map, players, and day counter.
      Throws:
      GameException - If the file contains corrupt data, unrecognized structures, or missing owners.
